title: User humidifier comfort preferences and device status
summary: The user prefers 40%-55% ambient humidity for comfort, with 45% as the default optimal target, prefers auto mode for quiet humidification during sleep/early morning periods, requires activating the humidifier whenever ambient humidity drops below 40%, uses 60% target humidity when ambient humidity is below 25% or when experiencing dry air; the user's Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2 (device ID: miot_cloud_922570899) has persistent unresolvable activation failure, multiple repeated activation attempts including setting 45% and 60% target humidity when ambient humidity was far below threshold still failed consistently despite the device showing online with full water supply, no further automatic adjustments can be made and the user has been repeatedly notified to check the device.
details: Use 60% target humidity when ambient humidity <25% or user experiences dry air
Activate humidifier when ambient humidity drops below 40%
Prefer auto mode for quiet humidification during sleep/early morning
Mijia Smart Anti-bacterial Humidifier 2 (ID: miot_cloud_922570899) has persistent unresolvable activation failure

User has been repeatedly notified to check the device
